text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Hehehe! Do you know what day it is?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text: Haaa-ha-ha! Why, of course I do!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
It is none other… than the day I was 
entrusted with my very first solo errand!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Whaaat? No way! That's so cool!

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text: Wait, no, no, no! That's not it! Today's a special day for me!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Umm… Is it the day you first ran 
in a race, maybe?

text_block_list.name: Haru Urara
text_block_list.text:
Wait, no, not that either! 
Hm, okay, here's a hint…

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
We only jest — it was a surprise! My teasing 
heightened the suspense, did it not?

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Now then, let us celebrate 
this joyful occasion!

text_block_list.name: T.M. Opera O
text_block_list.text:
Happy birthday, Urara! 
Here's to a good year ahead!

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Hehe. I got a little nervous there… 
Happy birthday!
